channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: iOS 27 : cette fuite nous renseigne sur ce qu’Apple présentera en juin
item.description: Une nouvelle fuite relative à iOS 27 nous renseigne partiellement sur ce qu'Apple concocte pour sa prochaine WWDC, en juin 2026. Au menu notamment, l'arrivée d'une fonction attendue depuis des lustres sur l'application Apple Cartes.

item.title: Amazon allegedly pressured companies to raise product prices with other retailers
item.description: Rob Bonta, the Attorney General of California, has released an unredacted copy of a legal document that the state filed in relation to its lawsuit against Amazon, containing details of the company’s alleged price fixing scheme. In it, the state of California accuses the e-commerce company of reaching out to brands and asking them to “fix” the retail prices of their products on competitors’ websites. Due to Amazon’s “overwhelming bargaining leverage” and out of fear of punishment, the brands agree to raise their products’ prices on other retailers like Walmart and Target or to remove them altog...

item.title: Apple : de l’AirPower à l’iPhone Air, les 9 plus gros ratés de l’ère Tim Cook
item.description: C’est la fin d’une époque pour la Silicon Valley : après 15 ans de règne, Tim Cook cède officiellement son fauteuil de PDG à John Ternus. Si le successeur de Steve Jobs quitte un empire financièrement au sommet, son héritage est loin d’être sans taches.

item.title: Apple will have a product guy as CEO again
item.description: John Ternus is going to be Apple's next CEO. And while outgoing CEO Tim Cook was lauded for his approach to logistics, Ternus' history is that of a product person. Ternus, Apple's SVP of hardware engineering before being officially tapped to take over the top job, has been increasingly in the public eye to help […]

item.title: Fin de l’ère Tim Cook : la plus grande réussite du patron d’Apple n’est ni un iPhone, ni un MacBook, ni des AirPods
item.description: Tim Cook quitte la direction d'Apple après quasiment 15 années à la tête de la deuxième boîte tech la plus valorisée au monde. De son bilan contrasté, jalonné autant de réussites (les Apple Watch et les AirPods) que d'échecs (l'Apple Vision Pro, le projet Titan, le retard sur l'IA), il y a un succès que nous retenons particulièrement : celui des services Apple. ...

item.title: Best Gaming Laptops (2026): Razer, Asus, Dell, and More
item.description: You don't want any old gaming laptop. Here's my take on which to get based on hundreds of hours of testing.

item.title: Apple TV est désormais disponible sur Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Apple TV fait son arrivée sur Prime Video. En souscrivant à une offre complémentaire, les abonnés de Prime Video pourront avoir accès au catalogue d'Apple TV.

item.title: Un traceur Bluetooth à 5 euros a trahi l’escorte secrète du Charles de Gaulle pendant 24 heures
item.description: Pas besoin de hackers ni de satellites espions. Une simple carte postale équipée d'un traceur à cinq euros a suffi à exposer la position de la frégate néerlandaise Evertsen, chargée de protéger le porte-avions Charles de Gaulle, pendant près d'une journée entière en pleine Méditerranée.

item.title: Amazon casse le prix du Xiaomi Redmi 15C : -40 % sur ce smartphone à l’autonomie XXL
item.description: Vous cherchez un smartphone fonctionnel pas cher ? On a ce qu’il vous faut : le Xiaomi Redmi 15C, un smartphone noté 7/10 par nos soins, voit son prix chuter à 92,84 euros alors qu'il est sorti au prix de 153 euros.

item.title: The Morning After: The next CEO of Apple will be hardware exec John Ternus
item.description: Apple’s current SVP of hardware engineering John Ternus will take over as the new CEO when Tim Cook steps down this September. Cook said in a statement: “It has been the greatest privilege of my life to be the CEO of Apple and to have been trusted to lead such an extraordinary company.” Following the death of co-founder Steve Jobs, Cook led the charge for Apple’s post-iPhone and iPad era, launching the AirPods, Apple Watch and Vision Pro. He also turned the company into a service provider with the launch of Apple TV, Apple Music and several other subscription services. Cook will transition to ...

item.title: Le nouvel Apple de John Ternus sera-t-il toujours aussi dépendant de l’iPhone ?
item.description: Apple est très dépendant de l'iPhone, mais profite aussi de sa force commerciale hors du commun. Une situation délicate à gérer pour le nouveau patron, John Ternus.

item.title: 2025 was the worst year on record for internet shutdowns as censors move to more targeted blocks
item.description: Access Now's latest report on internet shutdowns reveals that 2025 was the worst year on record for digital freedom. With VPNs and satellite internet increasingly under fire, we recap the year’s biggest threats and look at what’s next for global connectivity.

item.title: This Scammer Used an AI-Generated MAGA Girl to Grift ‘Super Dumb’ Men
item.description: A med student says he’s made thousands of dollars selling photos and videos of a young conservative woman he created using generative tools. He’s not alone.

item.title: Yelp is making its AI chatbot way more useful
item.description: Yelp is giving its chatbot assistant a major upgrade, turning the platform into something closer to a digital concierge with a suite of new features designed for "getting things done." The move, one of several AI-focused updates in recent months, is part of a broader industry push to make AI more relevant and practically useful […]

item.title: Yelp’s updated AI assistant can answer questions and book a restaurant or service in one conversation
item.description: Yelp said that users can ask questions about a restaurant and place an order or book a table in one conversation

item.title: Yelp's AI chatbot can now make your dinner reservation
item.description: Every business seems to think that its customers want more AI. Yelp is the latest to add more artificial intelligence tools. The review site has upgraded its Yelp Assistant, an agentic AI chatbot, to work across all of Yelp's categories. Yelp Assistant was initially launched in 2024 with a limited scope and then expanded in 2025.With the latest update to its chatbot, Yelp Assistant can handle natural language queries for finding a specific local business. It can also be used to take some additional actions, such as making a restaurant reservation or ordering takeout. Yelp's spring product upda...

item.title: Yelp adds AI-powered search and booking for local services
item.description: Users can now book haircuts, doctor visits, and food delivery through new partnerships and in-app tools. You can now book haircuts, doctors’ appointments, and food deliveries through Yelp.The business search and review platform has rolled out integrations with providers including DoorDash, Zocdoc, and Vagaro, letting users book appointments and order food directly from a Yelp listing or through the AI-powered Yelp Assistant. Users could already request quotes from businesses ranging from home and auto repair professionals to beauty experts....

item.title: Seth Meyers recap of the past 3 weeks is a wild, chaotic ride
item.description: Seth Meyers has rounded up all the wild things that have happened with "Late Night" was on a three-week break.

item.title: Google Photos : cette nouvelle fonction pour vos selfies va diviser les puristes
item.description: Google Photos commence à déployer ses outils de retouche de visage pour les utilisateurs Android. De quoi ajuster vos selfies directement depuis l'application, en quelques secondes.

item.title: "75% of web designers now fear AI more than shrinking budgets": How AI is reshaping web design and how web pros can adapt
item.description: With 3-in-4 web designers struggling to find new clients, we look at how AI is changing the face of web design.

item.title: Why enterprises need governance frameworks for agentic AI
item.description: AI agents are making decisions for your business. That's why we need a new model of accountability for them.

item.title: How the ’empathy trap’ keeps women out of leadership roles
item.description: The problem is not awareness. It is permission for inequity to persist. Power has a way of narrowing progress—and the narrowing follows a pattern.

item.title: Microsoft issues warning over Teams helpdesk impersonation attacks – hackers are 'blending into routine IT support activity' by abusing remote assistance access
item.description: Crooks are impersonating IT and reaching out via Teams, only to be granted access and steal data.

item.title: Amazon is offering a free $100 gift card with the Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra — how to claim
item.description: Amazon is offering Prime members a bonus $100 gift card with purchase of a Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra for $649.99.

item.title: Why corporate America should pay for women to freeze their eggs
item.description: The ‘silent tax’ of egg freezing isn’t just a private burden on individuals. It’s a public-policy failure with major consequences for business and society. As inflation causes prices to rise, there is a cost that disproportionately impacts women—the “egg freezing tax.” In 2023, over 40,000 women froze their eggs—a safe, proven way to invest in more control over the timing of one’s family—which has grown in popularity for many reasons: general declines in fertility rates, delayed family building, and increasing numbers of women choosing to become a single mom by choice....

item.title: BYD lance sa marque premium Denza en France : voici les 5 voitures qui débarquent pour bousculer Mercedes et Audi
item.description: À peine arrivée en Europe que Denza, la marque premium de BYD, annonce un plan produit intense : 5 voitures électriques et hybrides seront lancées avant la fin d'année 2026. En parallèle de la Z9GT et du D9, voici les trois modèles à venir.

item.title: Le nouveau rôle de Tim Cook chez Apple : quelles sont les missions de l’ancien PDG ?
item.description: Après 15 ans à la direction d’Apple, Tim Cook s’apprête à rendre son tablier… mais il ne quitte pas l'entreprise pour autant. Apple va lui confier une série de missions stratégiques, qui continueront d'influer sur l'avenir de la société californienne.

item.title: 'We know you know' — Ubisoft officially announces Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, which will receive a 'dedicated' worldwide reveal showcase this week
item.description: Ubisoft has announced that the Assassin's Creed IV Black Flag remake will be officially revealed this week.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Ascended Heroes Mega Feraligatr ex Box is available to pre-order for under market value
item.description: Preorder the Ascended Heroes Mega Feraligatr ex Box for $74.97 at TCGplayer, $8.58 under market price.

item.title: Artemis II : Reid Wiseman dévoile une vidéo gardée en réserve, et elle est peut-être la plus énorme de toutes
item.description: Tout au long de la mission Artemis II, et encore après, la Nasa s’est appliquée à partager des images extraordinaires renvoyées par l’équipage. Mais cette vidéo qui vient d’être publiée est inattendue. Voici pourquoi.

item.title: 'NHS users report that it is awful to use': Palantir could be forced to exit NHS after pushback from staff, MPs, unions, and pressure groups over Federated Data Platform
item.description: MPs want Palantir's contract with the NHS to end early, stating that the FDP is awful to use.

item.title: H2O Audio Tri Run Workout Headphones Review: A Little Underwhelming
item.description: H2O Audio’s stab at a sub-$100 pair of bone-conduction workout headphones just misses the mark.

item.title: The Internet’s Favorite Lawyer Says We’re Living Through ‘Multiple Watergates per Week’
item.description: Devin Stone turned punchy legal explainers into a YouTube empire. Now he’s warning that the sheer volume of Trump administration scandals is distorting reality itself.

item.title: Software 3.0 is speeding up coding - but delivery is a different story
item.description: AI writes code faster than ever — but smart teams know speed isn't the whole story.

item.title: Lego is giving away free N-1 Starfighter models on Star Wars Day — how to claim yours
item.description: How to get Lego for free. Lego is giving away free N-1 Starfighter models on Star Wars Day.

item.title: I've found the best Samsung Galaxy A57 covers to keep your new mid-range handset protected from bumps and scratches
item.description: These cases combine rugged build quality and stylish looks to keep your phone protected and looking good at the same time.

item.title: Hisense M2 Pro : ce picoprojecteur laser 4K Dolby Vision lumineux s’allège de 300 €
item.description: Format compact et nomade, images en 4K jusqu’à 200 pouces, bonne luminosité... Le Hisense M2 Pro n'a pas volé sa très bonne note de 8/10. La bonne nouvelle, c'est qu'on le trouve actuellement à 691 euros au lieu de 990 euros chez EasyLounge.

item.title: 'They ruined my favorite movie': fans slam Practical Magic 2 trailer for 'Netflix lighting' as Sandra Bullock and Nicole Kidman legacy sequel swaps haunting darkness for pastel color
item.description: The first trailer for Practical Magic 2 is here — and if the lighting is anything to go by, things are feeling a lot less spooky.

item.title: Stephen Colbert roasts Trump for his Iran war strategy
item.description: Stephen Colbert has unpacked the recent negotiations between Trump and Iran.

item.title: Goodbye, Cosmic Orange — the iPhone 18 Pro's possible colors have leaked, and everyone's talking about one specific shade
item.description: Dark Cherry could be the signature color for the iPhone 18 Pro line, and it looks stunning in an unofficial render.

item.title: HireRight background check review: Efficient, compliant, but not flawless
item.description: Compliant, cloud-based verification services for employment background checks.

item.title: WhatsApp tests Plus subscription. But what do you actually get?
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out a paid tier for the app, as Meta moves into premium subscriptions.

item.title: The 'unbeatable' and five-star-rated JBL Charge 6 just got a big discount at Best Buy
item.description: Save $40 on the five-star JBL Charge 6 at Best Buy.

item.title: Fitbit Air : on connaît le prix et les différents looks du futur bracelet sans écran de Google
item.description: En amont du lancement du bracelet Fitbit Air de Google, le site Droid Life a partagé de nouvelles informations à son sujet, dont son prix, sa disponibilité et les différents coloris proposés.
